overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character journeying through golden grass fields and shallow wetlands toward traditional Japanese stilt houses. The scene features dramatic overcast skies with cinematic lighting and atmospheric mist.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow dirt path surrounded by tall golden grass

entered.detail: narrow brown dirt trail winding through the grass field
dense field of tall golden-yellow grass swaying in wind
dense field of tall golden-yellow grass swaying in wind
traditional Japanese wooden buildings on stilts visible in the misty distance
low-lying fog hovering over the distant grass and water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dirt path cutting through a vast field of tall golden grass under an overcast sky. The camera follows the samurai character from behind as they walk steadily forward, with traditional stilt houses barely visible through the mist in the far distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense grass field approaching wetland village

events.description: character steps off the dirt path and begins walking directly through the tall grass

agents.ego_description: walking through the tall grass field, moving toward the distant stilt houses

entered.detail: tall wooden posts with crossbars scattered across the landscape

segments.scene_description: Leaving the path behind, the character pushes through the dense golden grass toward a distant village. The stilt houses grow gradually larger on the horizon as wooden utility poles become visible against the gray sky.

events.description: ground becomes marshy and water becomes visible between grass tufts

agents.ego_description: walking through thinning grass toward the water's edge where stilt houses stand

entered.detail: dark shallow water surrounding the stilt house structures
short wooden posts marking the boundary of the path
green moss-covered stones emerging from the shallow water

segments.scene_description: The grass thins as the character approaches the wetland edge. Dark water appears between the golden stalks, and the stilt houses now loom clearly on the right, their green thatched roofs and wooden structures reflected in the still water.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow water approach to stilt house dock

events.description: character steps from grassy marsh into shallow water

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow water toward the wooden dock and stilt houses

notable_agents.action: figures standing on the wooden dock near moored boats

entered.detail: murky brown water covering the ground, reflecting the overcast sky
weathered wooden pier structure with mooring posts
wooden fishing boat tied to the dock

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shallow water, wading toward the stilt houses. Mossy rocks dot the water's edge, and a wooden dock comes into view on the right with small boats moored alongside. Distant figures can be seen standing on the dock as the character approaches the settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vast, golden grassland toward a misty riverside settlement. It begins on a dirt path under an overcast sky, following a samurai as they walk steadily through tall golden grass with stilt houses barely visible in the distance. As the character leaves the path and pushes deeper into the dense foliage, the village grows larger on the horizon and wooden utility poles emerge against the gray sky. The scene then shifts as the grass thins at the wetland's edge, revealing dark, still water that reflects the green thatched roofs of the looming structures. Finally, the camera follows the character as they wade into the shallow water past mossy rocks, approaching a wooden dock where small boats are moored and distant figures wait.
